@@ -683,7 +684,8 @@ static void ColoredWriteToStderr(LogSeverity severity,
   // Avoid using cerr from this module since we may get called during
   // exit code, and cerr may be partially or fully destroyed by then.
   if (COLOR_DEFAULT == color) {
-    fwrite(message, len, 1, stderr);
+    fwrite(message, len, 1, severity > 0 ? stderr : stdout);
+    fflush(severity > 0 ? stderr : stdout);
     return;
   }

@@ -783,12 +785,13 @@ inline void LogDestination::LogToSinks(LogSeverity severity,
                                        int line,
                                        const struct ::tm* tm_time,
                                        const char* message,
+                                       size_t prefix_len,
                                        size_t message_len) {
   ReaderMutexLock l(&sink_mutex_);
   if (sinks_) {
     for (int i = sinks_->size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
       (*sinks_)[i]->send(severity, full_filename, base_filename,
-                         line, tm_time, message, message_len);
+                         line, tm_time, message, prefix_len, message_len);
     }
   }
 }

-                           time_pid_string;
+                           time_pid_string + "_log.txt";

   int fd = open(filename, O_WRONLY | O_CREAT | O_EXCL, FLAGS_logfile_mode);
   if (fd == -1) return false;
